# ⚠️ Pull Requests Are Not Accepted Here

Thank you for your interest in contributing to **Reopen Closed Tabs Menu**!

However, this repository is automatically maintained and **pull requests opened here will not be merged**.

## How to Contribute

Please open your pull request in the main repository instead:

**Main Repository**: [BibekBhusal0/zen-custom-js/reopen-closed-tabs](https://github.com/BibekBhusal0/zen-custom-js/tree/main/reopen-closed-tabs)

### Steps:

1. Fork the main repository: https://github.com/BibekBhusal0/zen-custom-js
2. Make your changes in the `reopen-closed-tabs` directory
3. Open a pull request there

For more details, see [CONTRIBUTING.md](./CONTRIBUTING.md).

---

_This repository is automatically synced from the main repository._
